## Meeting Purpose

[Align on sales processes, roles, and responsibilities to improve efficiency and clarity for the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on streamlining pre-sales prep and post-call follow-up processes](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Implement regular check-ins (pipe reviews, standups) to maintain momentum and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Leverage Adio as the single source of truth, using comments for deal updates and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3802.0)
  - [Prioritize high-intent opportunities and maintain pipeline hygiene to close 2 SOWs per week](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4578.0)

## Topics

### Pre-Sales Process Improvement

  - [Implement a system for Owen to prepare detailed notes before calls, including:](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [Company fit assessment](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [SEO visibility and authority score](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Key stakeholder information](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [Relevant background details](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Utilize Fathom for call recordings and transcripts to gather context](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Create and leverage "leave-behind" materials (e.g., videos, audits) to enhance prospect engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)

### Post-Call Follow-up Optimization

  - [Owen to draft follow-up emails based on Fathom call recaps](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Bruno to review and add SOW if the opportunity is qualified](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Use Adio comments to communicate next steps and maintain deal history](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3821.0)
  - [Prioritize booking next meetings for qualified opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3628.0)

### Pipeline Management and Hygiene

  - [Regular review and cleanup of open deals in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4164.0)
  - [Focus on moving high and medium intent opportunities forward](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4248.0)
  - [Close or reassess low-intent opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4256.0)
  - [Ensure proper documentation of closed-lost reasons](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4306.0)

### Team Communication and Rituals

  - [Implement daily stand-ups (15 minutes) to discuss priorities and blockers](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=2897.0)
  - [Conduct regular pipe review meetings to assess deal progress and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Use Slack and Adio comments for clear, asynchronous communication](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3861.0)

### Automation and Process Refinement

  - [Explore options for automating task creation in Adio when new deals are created](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3503.0)
  - [Continuously refine processes based on team feedback and efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3972.0)
  - [Consider implementing Linear for project management templates (e.g., 12-week engagement outline)](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Owen to add Jason and Marcel's calendars for visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4484.0)
  - [Prioritize pre-call prep and post-call follow-ups for this week's meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4462.0)
  - [Begin pipeline cleanup process, focusing on high-intent opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4053.0)
  - [Kyle to schedule new recurring team meetings upon return from vacation](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=4443.0)
  - [Team to continue refining processes and identifying areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/7hWyvCafjFdhoA9CwQ6Z61kNxNCLyzj4?tab=summary&timestamp=3998.0)
